data.current_description: Get stats for lists, blasts, or sends.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve analytics for campaigns, lists, or sends
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed analytics and performance statistics for email campaigns (blasts), subscriber lists, or transactional sends. Supports filtering by date range, metric type, and other parameters. Returns aggregated statistics including delivery, engagement, and performance metrics. Use this operation to analyze campaign performance, list health, or send delivery metrics.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague and lack specificity. The description doesn't clarify what 'stats' means in the Sailthru context (analytics/metrics), doesn't explain the 9 parameters or their purpose, doesn't describe what metrics are returned, and doesn't help AI agents understand when to use this operation. The improved version uses domain-appropriate terminology ('blasts' for campaigns, 'engagement metrics'), explains the operation's purpose, indicates parameter filtering capabilities, describes return value types, and provides clear use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Create or update a user profile
data.current_description: Create or update a user profile
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new user profile or updates an existing one identified by email, sid, extid, or SMS number. Accepts user profile attributes such as name, email, preferences, and custom fields. Returns the created or updated UserProfile object. If the user exists, only provided fields are updated (partial updates supported); if the user does not exist, a new profile is created.
data.reasoning: Description is repetitive and lacks essential details. Added clarity on identifier types, input parameters, return value, and behavior differences between create vs. update scenarios. This helps AI agents understand the operation's dual nature and when to use it.

data.current_summary: Send, schedule, or update a triggered message
data.current_description: Send, schedule, or update a triggered message
data.description_suggestion: Sends, schedules, or updates a triggered transactional message to one or more recipients. Accepts recipient identifiers (email, sid, extid, SMS), template selection, personalization variables, and optional scheduling parameters. Returns SendResponse with send_id and status. Supports immediate delivery, scheduled delivery, or updating existing scheduled sends. Requires valid template and recipient information.

message: Operation 'cancelSend' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.description_suggestion: Cancels a scheduled triggered send identified by send_id. Only affects sends that have not yet been delivered. Returns confirmation of cancellation. Cannot cancel sends that are already in progress or completed. Requires the send_id of the scheduled message.
